liquibase.command

Class CommandArgumentDefinition.Building<DataType>

  • java.lang.Object
    • liquibase.command.CommandArgumentDefinition.Building<DataType>
  • Enclosing class:
    CommandArgumentDefinition<DataType>

    public static class CommandArgumentDefinition.Building<DataType>
extends Object
    A new CommandArgumentDefinition under construction from CommandBuilder

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      CommandArgumentDefinition<DataType> build()
      Complete construction and register the definition with the rest of the system.
      CommandArgumentDefinition.Building<DataType> defaultValue(DataType defaultValue)
      Convenience version of defaultValue(Object, String) but using String.valueOf(Object) for the description.

      Set the default value for this argument as well as the description of the default value.

      Mark argument as required.

      CommandArgumentDefinition.Building<DataType> setValueObfuscator(ConfigurationValueObfuscator<DataType> valueObfuscator)

      • build

        public CommandArgumentDefinition<DataType> build()

        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - is an invalid configuration was specified
